tags.name: artifacts
tags.description: Manage artifacts produced by job and task executions (logs, results, cache).

tags.name: audit
tags.description: Query the system audit log for security and compliance.

tags.name: configs
tags.description: Manage system-level configurations and job definition config properties.

tags.name: error-codes
tags.description: Manage error code definitions for automatic retry/suspend/fail behavior on task errors.

tags.name: health
tags.description: System health checks and Prometheus metrics.

tags.name: job-definitions
tags.description: Manage job definitions (workflow templates with DAG task graphs).

tags.name: job-executions
tags.description: Submit and manage job execution requests.

tags.name: job-resources
tags.description: Manage virtual resources for job concurrency control (mutex, semaphores, quotas).

tags.name: organizations
tags.description: Manage organizations (multi-tenant grouping of users and job definitions).

tags.name: resources
tags.description: Manage ant worker registrations and user quota subscriptions.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Manage user accounts, authentication, and profiles.

get.description: Returns aggregated job, user, ant, and resource statistics for the admin dashboard. Optionally filtered by date range.

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or request body

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token

429.description: Too many requests — rate limit exceeded

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: start_date is an optional RFC3339 timestamp for the start of the time range.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: end_date is an optional RFC3339 timestamp for the end of the time range.

get.description: Returns a list of currently registered ant worker processes, optionally filtered by method or tags.

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or request body

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token

429.description: Too many requests — rate limit exceeded

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: method filters by task method string.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: tags filters by comma-separated tag list.

JobDefinitionServiceUpdateConcurrencyBod.description: UpdateConcurrencyRequest changes the max_concurrency for a job definition.

hard.description: hard forces all tasks to re-run from scratch, ignoring previously completed task results.

version.description:
version controls which job definition version to use on restart.
Empty (default) keeps the currently pinned version.
"latest" upgrades to the latest deployed definition for this job type.

JobExecutionServiceRestartJobBody.description: RestartJobRequest restarts a failed or cancelled job request.

queenAuditRecord.description: AuditRecord captures an auditable event in the system.

min_ns.description: min_ns is the minimum backoff duration in nanoseconds.

max_ns.description: max_ns is the maximum backoff duration in nanoseconds.

factor.description: factor is the exponential backoff multiplier (e.g., 2 for doubling).

jitter.description: jitter adds randomization to prevent thundering herd.

queenBackoffPolicy.description: BackoffPolicy configures exponential backoff with optional jitter for retries.

regex.description: regex is the pattern matched against the task error message.

exit_code.description: exit_code matches on process exit code (0 means not used).

error_code.description: error_code is the canonical error identifier (e.g. ERR_TASK_TIMED_OUT).

action.description: action controls what happens when this error is triggered: RETRY_JOB, RETRY_TASK, SUSPEND_JOB, HARD_FAILURE.

retry.description: retry specifies how many times to retry when this error code matches.

queenErrorCode.description:
ErrorCode defines a pattern-matched error code that triggers a specific action on task failure.
Error codes can map regex patterns or exit codes to retry/suspend/fail behaviors.

retry_backoff_policy.description: retry_backoff_policy defines exponential backoff for job retries.

queenJobDefinition.description:
JobDefinition outlines a DAG of tasks executed by ant workers.
A new JobExecution is created when a JobRequest is scheduled against this definition.

queenJobDefinitionConfig.description: JobDefinitionConfig holds a named configuration property for a job definition.

queenJobDefinitionVariable.description: JobDefinitionVariable holds a named variable for a job definition (defined inline in YAML).

queenJobExecution.description: JobExecution tracks a specific execution instance of a job request.

queenJobExecutionContext.description: JobExecutionContext stores a context variable produced during job execution.

hard_restart.description:
hard_restart forces all tasks to re-run from scratch on next restart,
ignoring any previously completed task results. Cleared after the job starts executing.

queenJobRequest.description: JobRequest represents a user's request to execute a job definition.

queenJobRequestParam.description: JobRequestParam holds a named parameter passed with a job request.

valid_status.description: valid_status indicates whether this resource is healthy and available.

quota.description: quota is the maximum total value that can be allocated simultaneously (1 = mutex).

lease_timeout_ns.description: lease_timeout_ns is the max nanoseconds to hold a lease before auto-release.

configs.description: configs stores named configuration properties for this resource.

name_value_configs_json.description: name_value_configs is a transient map of resource variables keyed by name.

queenJobResource.description:
JobResource represents a virtual resource used to implement mutex/semaphores or quota limits for jobs.
Jobs can declare resource requirements and the scheduler enforces limits based on current allocations.

kind.description: kind is the data type (STRING, INT, BOOL, etc.).

value.description: value stored as string (encrypted if secret is true).

queenJobResourceConfig.description: JobResourceConfig stores a named configuration property for a job resource.

job_request_id.description: job_request_id is the ID of the job request that consumed this resource.

value.description: value consumed by this use (1 for mutex/semaphore).

aborted.description: aborted is true if the resource was released forcefully (e.g., timeout).

remaining_quota.description: remaining_quota is a transient field computed at query time.

queenJobResourceUse.description: JobResourceUse records a single allocation of a job resource by a task execution.

queenResourceCriteriaConfig.description: ResourceCriteriaConfig defines properties to extract from a resource into job variables.

queenReviewTaskRequest.description: ReviewTaskRequest is used for manual approval of a task.

scope.description: scope defines the configuration scope (e.g., "default", org-unit name).

queenSystemConfig.description: SystemConfig holds a platform-level named configuration property.

on_exit_code_serialized.description: on_exit_code_serialized is the DB-persisted form of on_exit_code map.

on_exit_code_json.description: on_exit_code maps RequestState to next task type (transient, loaded from on_exit_code_serialized).

except.description: except stores the conditional skip expression.

retry_backoff_policy.description: retry_backoff_policy defines exponential backoff for task retries.

queenTaskDefinition.description: TaskDefinition specifies a unit of work within a job DAG.

queenTaskDefinitionVariable.description: TaskDefinitionVariable holds a named variable for a task definition.

queenTaskExecution.description: TaskExecution records the execution of one task within a job execution.

queenTaskExecutionContext.description: TaskExecutionContext stores a context variable produced during task execution.

task_types_json.description: task_types maps task-type to its current RequestState (stored as JSON in DB).

resourceAntAllocation.description: AntAllocation tracks capacity allocation for a specific job request on an ant worker.

methods.description: methods lists the TaskMethod values this ant supports (stored as strings).

allocations.description: allocations maps job_request_id to AntAllocation (serialized as JSON for messaging).

config_info.description: config_info holds arbitrary ant configuration metadata.

resourceAntRegistration.description:
AntRegistration registers a remote ant worker with the resource manager.
Ants broadcast this on the registration topic; the queen updates its capacity map.

bucket.description: bucket where the artifact is stored.

kind.description: kind classifies the artifact (LOGS, TASK_ARTIFACTS, USER_UPLOADED, CACHE).

metadata_serialized.description: metadata_serialized stores JSON-encoded metadata map (not exposed in API).

tags_serialized.description: tags_serialized stores JSON-encoded tags map (not exposed in API).

resourceArtifact.description: Artifact defines metadata for an artifact uploaded during job execution (logs, results, cache, etc.).

servicesComponentHealth.description: ComponentHealth holds health status for a single system component.

servicesContainerEventCount.description: ContainerEventCount holds execution method breakdown for container events.

servicesCreateJobDefinitionRequest.description: Job definition to create. Submit as JSON or set Content-Type: application/yaml for YAML.
servicesCreateJobDefinitionRequest.title: CreateJobDefinitionRequest

servicesCreateJobDefinitionResponse.description: CreateJobDefinitionResponse returns the newly created job definition.

servicesDashboardStatsResponse.description: DashboardStatsResponse contains all metrics displayed on the main dashboard.

servicesGetAntRegistrationResponse.description: GetAntRegistrationResponse wraps a single ant registration.

servicesGetErrorCodeResponse.description: GetErrorCodeResponse wraps a single error code.

servicesGetJobDefinitionMermaidResponse.description: GetJobDefinitionMermaidResponse carries the Mermaid diagram source.

servicesGetJobDefinitionResponse.description: GetJobDefinitionResponse wraps a single job definition.

servicesGetJobDefinitionStatsResponse.description: GetJobDefinitionStatsResponse carries job definition execution statistics.

servicesGetJobExecutionResponse.description:
GetJobExecutionResponse wraps a single job execution.
The mermaid field is populated only by the GetJobRequestMermaid RPC.

servicesGetJobRequestResponse.description: GetJobRequestResponse wraps a single job request.

servicesGetJobResourceResponse.description: GetJobResourceResponse wraps a single job resource.

servicesGetSystemConfigResponse.description: GetSystemConfigResponse wraps a single system config.

overall_status.description: overall_status is "healthy" when all components are OK, otherwise "degraded" or "down".

registered_ants.description: registered_ants lists currently connected ant worker counts by method.

servicesHealthResponse.description: HealthResponse reports overall system health and per-component status.

servicesJobCountsByDay.description: JobCountsByDay holds job execution counts for a single day.

servicesJobDefinitionStat.description: JobDefinitionStat aggregates execution stats for a single job type.

servicesJobRequestStat.description: JobRequestStat holds statistics for a single job type.

servicesJobRequestStatsResponse.description: JobRequestStatsResponse returns execution statistics aggregated by job type.

servicesJobWaitTimeResponse.description: JobWaitTimeResponse returns estimated wait time information.

servicesLoginRequest.description: Issues a JWT token for an authenticated user. Use OAuth (GitHub/Google) for authentication.
servicesLoginRequest.title: LoginRequest

token.description: JWT Bearer token. Pass in Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'.

servicesLoginResponse.description: LoginResponse returns a JWT token and user profile.

servicesQueryAntRegistrationsResponse.description: QueryAntRegistrationsResponse returns a paginated list of ant registrations.

servicesQueryArtifactsResponse.description: QueryArtifactsResponse returns a paginated list of artifacts.

servicesQueryAuditRecordsResponse.description: QueryAuditRecordsResponse returns a paginated list of audit records.

servicesQueryErrorCodesResponse.description: QueryErrorCodesResponse returns a paginated list of error codes.

servicesQueryJobConfigsResponse.description: QueryJobConfigsResponse returns a list of job definition configs.

servicesQueryJobRequestsResponse.description: QueryJobRequestsResponse returns a paginated list of job requests.

servicesQueryJobResourcesResponse.description: QueryJobResourcesResponse returns a paginated list of job resources.

servicesQueryOrgConfigsResponse.description: QueryOrgConfigsResponse returns a paginated list of org configs.

servicesQueryOrgsResponse.description: QueryOrgsResponse returns a paginated list of organizations.

servicesQuerySubscriptionsResponse.description: QuerySubscriptionsResponse returns a paginated list of subscriptions.

servicesQuerySystemConfigsResponse.description: QuerySystemConfigsResponse returns a paginated list of system configs.

servicesQueryUsersResponse.description: QueryUsersResponse returns a paginated list of users.

servicesResourceUsage.description: ResourceUsage holds CPU and disk usage metrics.

servicesSaveErrorCodeResponse.description: SaveErrorCodeResponse returns the saved error code.

servicesSaveJobConfigResponse.description: SaveJobConfigResponse returns the saved job config.

servicesSaveJobResourceResponse.description: SaveJobResourceResponse returns the saved job resource.

servicesSaveOrgConfigResponse.description: SaveOrgConfigResponse returns the saved org config.

servicesSaveSystemConfigResponse.description: SaveSystemConfigResponse returns the saved system config.

job_type.description: The job type to execute (must match an existing job definition).

params.description: Runtime parameters passed to the job template.

scheduled_at.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp to delay execution.

user_key.description: user_key allows deduplication — a second submit with the same user_key for the same job type is rejected.

servicesSubmitJobRequest.description: Parameters for submitting a new job execution.
servicesSubmitJobRequest.title: SubmitJobRequest

servicesSubmitJobResponse.description: SubmitJobResponse returns the created job request.

servicesUpdateJobDefinitionResponse.description: UpdateJobDefinitionResponse returns the updated job definition.

userOrganization.description: Organization represents a multi-tenant organization grouping one or more users.

userOrganizationConfig.description: OrganizationConfig holds an org-level named configuration property.

policy.description: policy is the subscription tier: FREEMIUM, BASIC, ENTERPRISE, UNLIMITED.

kind.description: kind is the subscription scope: INDIVIDUAL or ORGANIZATION.

period.description: period is the billing period: WEEKLY, MONTHLY, SEMI_ANNUAL, ANNUAL.

userSubscription.description: Subscription defines quota policy and usage period for a user or org.

notify_json.description: notify holds deserialized notification config (from notify_serialized).

v1domainBasicResource.description: BasicResource captures basic CPU/disk resource constraints.

resource_type.description: resource_type identifies the kind of resource (e.g., "DEVICE", "CPU", "LICENSE").

platform.description: platform specifies the OS platform or target runtime this resource applies to.

tags_serialized.description: tags_serialized stores JSON-encoded tags list (not exposed directly in API).

tags.description: tags is the deserialized transient list of tag strings.

value.description: value consumed per allocation (1 for mutex/semaphore, higher for quotas).

extract_config.description: extract_config extracts resource config properties into job context variables.

v1queenBasicResource.description:
BasicResource defines common properties of a resource used to implement mutex/semaphores for a job.
Resources can represent external constraints such as device limits, connection pools, or license counts.
